title: Department Manager Vacancy at Evok - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Evok - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
